title: Schemathesis Configuration
description: JSON Schema for Schemathesis .schemathesis.yml configuration file for configuring property-based API testing.

schema.description: URL or file path to the OpenAPI or GraphQL schema to test against.

url.description: Base URL of the API being tested.

workers.description: Number of concurrent workers for parallel test execution.

max_response_time.description: Maximum allowed response time in milliseconds.

checks.description: List of checks to perform on responses.

token.description: Bearer token or API key value.

header.description: Header name for API key authentication.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include in all requests.

endpoint.description: Filter test generation to specific endpoint path patterns.

method.description: Filter test generation to specific HTTP methods.

tag.description: Filter test generation to operations with specific OpenAPI tags.

hypothesis_max_examples.description: Maximum number of Hypothesis test examples to generate per operation.

stateful.description: Stateful testing mode. 'links' follows OpenAPI Links for multi-step workflow testing.

output_sanitize.description: Whether to sanitize sensitive data in test output and reports.

junit_xml.description: File path for JUnit XML output.
